creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
Thank you for the advice on the ways to improve the patch.

Options and their default values were taken directly as-is from upstream [0], some of them even being explicitly marked as experimental, other may be working the way I don't quite understand now, so I may and likely will just stick with the few ones I do know.

I'm to rework it in a few days, when I hope to have few free hours.

[0] https://lexbor.com/documentation/#linux-bsd-macos
